//: E-18 RELEASE overlay (auto-update). Deep-merged into tauri.conf.json via the Tauri CLI --config flag by .github/workflows/release.yml, and ONLY when the TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY secret is present. It flips bundle.createUpdaterArtifacts on so the release build produces the signed updater artifacts (.sig files) and the latest.json manifest. It is NOT applied by per-push CI (`pnpm tauri build` in ci.yml), so keyless CI never hits the 'signing key required' bundle failure - the committed tauri.conf.json keeps createUpdaterArtifacts OFF (ship-dark). Inert unless explicitly passed. The pubkey + endpoints stay in the base config; jp sets the real pubkey at activation.
